## Problem

Describe the problem or change request. Explain why this change is needed.

## Scope

List what is included in this issue.

- 

## Non-goals

List what should not be changed as part of this issue.

- 

## Acceptance criteria

Define how reviewers will know this issue is complete.

- [ ] 

## Validation

Describe the checks that should be run or the review evidence that should be provided.

- [ ] 

## Risks and caveats

Call out anything that may need careful review.

## Notes for Codex or other agents

Add implementation constraints, relevant files, conventions or branch-name guidance.
